text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I lost... again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SMACK!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a noise echoing suddenly from the corner
of the room.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. I know, but... Well, that's true.
choice_data_list: Are you talking to your friend?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes. She's concerned about me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... I've got you both worrying...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I know things shouldn't be like this, but...
choice_data_list: I know you can do it!
Don't let it get to you.
Don't let it get to you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I know things shouldn't be like this, but...
choice_data_list: I know you can do it!
Don't let it get to you.
Don't let it get to you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I... I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SMACK!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You might just be right...
choice_data_list: Wait, did she really say that?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Well... more or less...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But the nuances aren't important. You both
believe in me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: And that's all that matters...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you both... I promise... next time, I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If there's one thing I must conquer, it's the
darkness within...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SMACK!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I can't say no to the two of you... It's time
to do this.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you both... I'll do my best...
